column1: #   A/B: plumOS default build set. `PLUMOS_CORE_FILTER=plumos` builds these.
#        This set can include Onion-proven cores and plumOS-only cores.
#   O:   Onion-compatible catalog entry that is not in the plumOS default set yet.
#   libretro cores follow Onion-proven versions/recipes when Onion carries that
#   core. plumOS-only cores can follow upstream HEAD/latest until a regression
#   or A30 measurement gives a reason to pin. Exact source commits are pinned
#   when proven from Onion history or A30 regression testing.
# plumOS packages must be built from source with this recipe table. Do not ship
# Onion prebuilt core binaries as plumOS runtime cores.
